retrieval_results: However, model size, inference latency, and memory usage can become critical on resource-constrained devices. Cohere embeddings, in contrast, are generated by calling a remote API.
HuggingFace, Cohere, and BentoML each play different roles in the system. OpenGauss provides the persistent vector storage and retrieval backbone.
For deployment on AArch64 platforms, such as RK3568 boards, containerization becomes even more important because it reduces manual configuration drift across devices.
